name: Google Cloud Run

naming.description: Standard POSIX. K_ prefix vars are reserved by Knative/Cloud Run.

limits.notes: Max 100 env vars. Keys ≤ 256 chars, values ≤ 32 KB each. PORT is auto-set by Cloud Run.

notes: Cloud Run is built on Knative, so K8s ConfigMap format works. Use Secret Manager for sensitive values — Cloud Run can mount secrets directly as env vars or volumes.
